title: Breach of the Dreamline
summary: The Dreamline Core begins to rupture, sending shockwaves across the Dream Sector. Somnia summons the player urgently. Together, they travel to the Core, where corruption tendrils are attempting to overwrite the Dreamline’s structure. The player must stabilize the Core, protect Somnia from corruption backlash, and defeat the Echo‑Overmind — a powerful entity that speaks in the voices of past Codeborn. The battle reveals a memory fragment showing the player’s past self failing to protect the Dreamline.
